name: marketing-mode
tagline: ClawHub (164★): Marketing Mode combines 23 comprehensive marketing skills covering strategy, psychology, content, SEO, conversion optimizat
verdict: No defined output shape: the skill ends in unstructured advice with no required format or sections, so results are unpredictable. A 692-line idea catalog is dumped inline instead of referenced, bloating the file. It also never states what it's NOT for despite an extremely broad topic. Security and hygiene are fine.

highlights.summary: No defined deliverable shape anywhere — no file, format, or required sections for the 'recommendation' output; the entire skill ends in unstructured advice.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body despite an extremely broad topic surface where misfire (e.g. generic business-strategy or sales que
